description_long: This sculpture features an abstract arrangement of cylindrical and curved forms, rising vertically from a circular base. The composition includes a prominent, tilted cylinder intersected by a looping, ribbon-like element that wraps around the central axis. The structure is visually dynamic, with various geometric shapes interlocking and overlapping, creating a sense of upward movement and tension. The surface appears to be a uniform, matte light gray, suggesting it is made from concrete or painted metal. The base is solid and slightly stepped, providing stability to the otherwise airy and open design. The overall impression is modern and non-representational, emphasizing form and balance.
description: An abstract, modern sculpture of interlocking cylindrical and ribbon-like forms on a circular base, finished in matte light gray.
description_view_0: From this angle, the tilted cylinder and looping ribbon are most prominent, with the circular base clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the verticality and the way the ribbon element wraps around the central forms.
description_view_2: The sculpture appears more slender, with the intersecting shapes aligned and the base less pronounced.
description_view_3: The tilted cylinder and ribbon are visible from a different angle, showing the interplay of curves and straight lines.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban plaza or park.
